$comment: IS-FIXTURES — partial config/system.json fragment exercising the new `improvement_sharing` block (release-spec roadmap #4 OUTBOUND improvement-sharing; DD-7; original-design-spec §2.6). Synthetic Acme Cosmos. The OFF-by-default gate is flipped ON here so the zero-key outbound-sanitizer/assertShareable test runs the prepare-package path; require_operator_confirmation stays true (the LAW — it cannot be bypassed) and there is NO transmit target, only a LOCAL package_output_path. The private_terms deny list carries the SAME planted Acme Cosmos specifics as fixtures/work-recap-acme/private-terms.json so the OUTBOUND guard refuses the dirty record and passes the clean one. Sub-validated against schemas/config/system.schema.json#/properties/improvement_sharing. NOT a full system.json.
